title: Mirroring Tasks From Other Dashboards
excerpt: I am trying to figure out how to automatically pull a task that is assigned to me in another dashboard into mine. Members of our executive team use monday.com to create “To Do Lists” and share tasks. Many of the tasks ar…

posts.author: scloward (Scotty Cloward)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to figure out how to automatically pull a task that is assigned to me in another dashboard into mine. Members of our executive team use monday.com to create “To Do Lists” and share tasks. Many of the tasks are added into their own personal boards, but require more than just them. They will assign others to the task as well. I would like to find a way to pull and mirror the tasks they have assigned me to into my own board so I can see all of my things I need to do in one place instead of having to hunt each one down in all the individual boards.
